tasks.label: Publish to GitHub
tasks.command: & 'C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe' config user.name 'Oriyanshu-gif'; & 'C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe' config user.email 'oriyanshu@gmail.com'; & 'C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe' add .; & 'C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe' commit -m 'Initial export'; & 'C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe' push -u origin main

tasks.label: Publish to GitHub
tasks.command: git add . && git commit -m "Initial export" && git push -u origin main
